calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion & Motion To Schedule A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Clifton Inohara, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DCFS TRUST.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ANTHONY D. AGPAOA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Court admitted into evidence all declarations and exhibits attached to declarations filed in suppport of default prove-up.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,039.07
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,579.66
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $630.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $43,073.73
Judgment signed in open court.
